DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2004 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT INEZ GASPARD AND TURANESHA BERRY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: SUSTAINED without leave to amend; no opposition filed. The Court is striking the Second Amended Complaint on its own motion because the Second Amended Complaint was filed without leave of Court. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar May-27-2004 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
The Court's tentative ruling is HEARING REQUIRED. There being no appearance, theCourt denied defendants INEZ GASPARD and TURANESHA BERRY's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS with 5 days leave to amend from notice of entry of order. (301/JLW/eh) Christina T. Paxton, CSR 1558

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar May-25-2004 Continued To May-27-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT INEZ GASPARD and TURANESHA BERRY'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS: CONTINUED to 05/27/04. Plaintiff is to provide a courtesy copy of its opposition papers to Dept. 301 by 9:00 AM on 05/26/04 with a cover letter referencing the continued hearing date. (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
